case_title: MARK CARTON VS. CRAIG DEPPE ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARTON, MARK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEPPE, CRAIG $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $432.00 INTEREST, $293.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,225.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 66219734)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-08-2020 CONTINUED TO AUG-19-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-06-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE AUG-19-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARTON, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT DEPPE, CRAIG DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-08-2020 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-05-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-15-2020

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-06-2020 CONTINUED TO DEC-08-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
